positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed illustration of an ancient celestial atlas meeting bio-luminescent deep-sea life. The central focus is a stylized constellation map interwoven with fractal geometries and luminous, symmetrical fauna, such as ornate winged manta rays and spiraling cosmic vines. The style is retro-futuristic and psychedelic linework, combining the crispness of etching with the vibrant palette of deep space. Use strong contrast: rich indigo, ethereal teal, antique gold, and magenta accents against a deep midnight black background. The composition must be entirely centralized and framed, creating a perfect, clean silhouette suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Intricate patterns, clean lines, maximalist yet legible.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly rendered, disfigured, out of focus, mundane, boring
